title: Slimefun Texture Pack
description: A Texture Pack that does not require server to do anything
body:
Want to use slimefun texture pack?  
Your server operator does not want to add `item-models.yml`?  
No problem! Grab Optifine or CIT Resewn with this resourcepack, use the resourcepack!

**Currently only support `<=1.20.4`, plan for 1.20.6 and 1.21 is working**

Currently supported addons:
* Infinity expansion
* Bump (Partial)
